notes: The active V3 finish pass now targets the corrected 32-experiment matrix described in docs/pilots/v3_gpt_ablations.md.
Legacy March 2026 queue-era iterations under _campaigns/v3_finish_pass/iterations remain historical forensics only.
Use packages/codex:getV3CampaignSnapshot as the primary loop status surface; it combines cohort status with Temporal task-queue readiness.
2026-03-21 clean reset canceled the paused run cohort, preserved the active window/pool setup, and returned the campaign to preflight_clean.
Reset control now routes deletion through the paged resetRuns mutation path instead of the older monolithic action cleanup.

2026-03-21 score-stage hardening audit found three dominant issues under live rubric-gate/full-loop load: batch transport/apply brittleness, projection activity timeout pressure, and cohort status reads that still scanned too broadly.

The current patch set addresses those without wiping the cohort: stage activities now retry with bounded budgets, projection activities have a separate longer timeout, OpenAI batch/file polling has explicit transport retries, and V3 campaign status is cohort-scoped by explicit manifest tags.
